query:
SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN name LIKE '%bar %' OR name LIKE '%Bar %' OR name LIKE 'Bar %' OR name LIKE '% bar' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_bar_in_name,
  SUM(CASE WHEN name LIKE '%boteco%' OR name LIKE '%Boteco%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_boteco_in_name,
  SUM(CASE WHEN name LIKE '%gastro%' OR name LIKE '%Gastro%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_gastro_in_name,
  SUM(CASE WHEN name LIKE '%café%' OR name LIKE '%Café%' OR name LIKE '%cafe%' OR name LIKE '%Cafe%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_cafe_in_name,
  SUM(CASE WHEN name LIKE '%pizza%' OR name LIKE '%Pizza%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_pizza_in_name,
  COUNT(*) as total
FROM establishments 
WHERE categoryId = 2;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LUtXE4vPqQU3CD.root --database WG3U3sVg2ZrW6m8T99FRdE --execute SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN name LIKE '%bar %' OR name LIKE '%Bar %' OR name LIKE 'Bar %' OR name LIKE '% bar' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_bar_in_name,
  SUM(CASE WHEN name LIKE '%boteco%' OR name LIKE '%Boteco%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_boteco_in_name,
  SUM(CASE WHEN name LIKE '%gastro%' OR name LIKE '%Gastro%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_gastro_in_name,
  SUM(CASE WHEN name LIKE '%café%' OR name LIKE '%Café%' OR name LIKE '%cafe%' OR name LIKE '%Cafe%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_cafe_in_name,
  SUM(CASE WHEN name LIKE '%pizza%' OR name LIKE '%Pizza%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_pizza_in_name,
  COUNT(*) as total
FROM establishments 
WHERE categoryId = 2;
